name: Banana Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 Ripe bananas, mashed to equal 1 cup
3 medium Carrots, shredded to equal 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking dish.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and spices.
4. In another bowl, whisk together sugar, mashed bananas, and oil until well combined.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the dry ingredients until just combined.
7. Fold in oats and shredded carrots until evenly distributed.
8. Spread batter into prepared baking dish.
9. Sprinkle nuts on top if using.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
